description: Returns weather forecast for a given city, supporting single date or date range via Open-Meteo API.

capabilities.name: tool.weather.get
capabilities.description: Return weather forecast for a city. Supports single date, date range (startDate/endDate), or defaults to current date.

city.description: City name to search weather for

date.description: Single date for forecast (format YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides startDate/endDate if provided.

startDate.description: Start date for forecast period (format YYYY-MM-DD)

endDate.description: End date for forecast period (format YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to startDate if omitted.
